reviews.author: Monika Yadav
reviews.review_body:
Ascent International school is one of the best school in Greater Noida. Here Teachers treat every student like their own child. Everyone here is very much cooperative.
Best school to give this nation a strong nation builder.

reviews.school_name: Ascent International School - Block I,Delta II
reviews.author: Anupama Gupta
reviews.review_body: Ascent international school is the best school in Greater Noida. All staff members are well qualified . The principal of this school is very co- operative. Infrastructure is very good. The supporting staff takes care of the hygiene of the school. The future of the students studying here is very bright.

reviews.school_name: Ascent International School - Block I,Delta II
reviews.author: richa chaturvedi
reviews.review_body:
Ascent International School is one of the best School in Greater Noida. School Management is very  cooperative.
1. Lots of opportunities for the Teachers to teach and for the students to learn.
2. Staff is very co-operative and experienced.
3. Safe and peaceful environment.
4. Working culture is nice.
5. Teachers and Students receive lots of appreciations.
6. Good infrastructure.

reviews.school_name: Ascent International School - Block I,Delta II
reviews.author: Payal Gupta
reviews.review_body: Ascent international school is well maintained school. i am so grateful to be a part of such kind of institutions. they are providing best facilities to their students, they have best and latest laboratries for all subjects. Management of this school is so helpful and kind. best thing that I feel for this organisation all staff members are so hardworking and serve their duty very honestly. they have appointed best teachers who teach the students with best methodology

reviews.school_name: Ascent International School - Block I,Delta II
reviews.author: N I T Y A N A N D
reviews.review_body: My daughter is studying in school from past two years. I am very satisfied by seeing improvement and remarkable confidence level in my child's overall personality development, speaking skills and physical activity. I like the teaching methodology of the school where focus is given on less child student teacher ratio. I would like to extend my gratitude towards teachers and  school management.
